inputs.label: Total Runs Scored
inputs.businessContext: Runs scored by the team in the tournament.

businessContext_i18n.en: Runs scored by the team in the tournament.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Team im Turnier erzielte Läufe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Points marqués par l'équipe dans le tournoi.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carreras anotadas por el equipo en el torneo.

inputs.label: Overs Faced
inputs.businessContext: Total overs faced by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total overs faced by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takımın karşılaştığı toplam over sayısı, ondalık olarak ifade edilir (örneğin, 50 over ve 3 top için 50.3).
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Team insgesamt gespielte Over, als Dezimalzahl (z.B. 50,3 für 50 Over und 3 Bälle).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des overs affrontés par l'équipe, exprimé sous forme décimale (par exemple, 50,3 pour 50 overs et 3 balles).
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de overs enfrentados por el equipo, expresado como decimal (ej., 50.3 para 50 overs y 3 bolas).

inputs.label: Total Runs Conceded
inputs.businessContext: Runs conceded by the team in the tournament.

businessContext_i18n.en: Runs conceded by the team in the tournament.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Team im Turnier kassierte Läufe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Points concédés par l'équipe dans le tournoi.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carreras concedidas por el equipo en el torneo.

inputs.label: Overs Bowled
inputs.businessContext: Total overs bowled by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total overs bowled by the team, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 50.3 for 50 overs and 3 balls).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Takımın attığı toplam over, ondalık olarak ifade edilir (ör. 50.3, 50 over ve 3 top).
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Team insgesamt geworfene Over, als Dezimalzahl (z.B. 50,3 für 50 Over und 3 Bälle).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des overs lancés par l'équipe, exprimé en décimal (ex. : 50,3 pour 50 overs et 3 balles).
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de overs lanzados por el equipo, expresado como decimal (ej., 50.3 para 50 overs y 3 bolas).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
